summary: BLOCK 571 & 572 Testing Complete. All features verified working: Admin override (user ID 4072aaa7-1171-4cd2-9c8f-20dfca8fdc58 with email fallback), cache-bust v=2.3.9 on 137/137 images, inline Gold Shield SVG 32x32 with 3-stop gradient and glow, 50ms thumb preview, shimmer state (not broken icon), error cascade fallback. Backend logs confirmed 'BLOCK 571: Admin override applied for user ID'.

issues: Accessibility warning: DialogContent missing DialogTitle for screen reader users (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: BLOCK 571 ✅ - server.py: Admin override uses hard-coded ADMIN_USER_ID='4072aaa7-1171-4cd2-9c8f-20dfca8fdc58' with email fallback ['kmklodnicki@gmail.com', 'katie@thehoneygroove.com'] (lines 171-191)
BLOCK 571 ✅ - AlbumArt.js: bustCache() appends ?v=2.3.9 (or &v=2.3.9 if URL has params) (lines 19-24)
BLOCK 571 ✅ - ProfilePage.js: GoldenHiveShield inline SVG 32x32, 3-stop gradient (#FFD700, #FDB931, #B8860B), drop-shadow glow (lines 85-95)
BLOCK 572 ✅ - AlbumArt.js: 50ms thumb preview via setTimeout (lines 84-87)
BLOCK 572 ✅ - AlbumArt.js: status='shimmer' renders null (no img element), preventing broken icon (line 134, 168)
BLOCK 572 ✅ - AlbumArt.js: Error cascade proxy→WebP fallback→error with Disc icon (lines 151-161)
BLOCK 569 BUG FIX PRESERVED: CollectionPage.js IntersectionObserver useEffect (line 773) correctly placed after sortedAndFilteredRecords useMemo (line 708)
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 571/572 fully verified. Admin user katieintheafterglow (ID: 4072aaa7-1171-4cd2-9c8f-20dfca8fdc58) has golden_hive_verified=true, is_admin=true. All AlbumArt images use cache-bust v=2.3.9. Gold Shield is inline SVG in ProfilePage.js. The shimmer state renders silk-shimmer div but NO img element (null) to prevent browser broken icon. Previous CollectionPage.js temporal dead zone fix is still in place.

block_571_backend_log_message.description: Backend startup log contains 'BLOCK 571: Admin override applied for user ID 4072aaa7-1171-4cd2-9c8f-20dfca8fdc58'

block_572_shimmer_on_error.description: 8s timeout changes status to 'shimmer' (not 'error'), shows silk-shimmer indefinitely

block_572_shimmer_no_img.description: status='shimmer' renders null (no img element), preventing browser broken icon

block_572_error_cascade.description: Fallback cascade: proxy → WebP to original → error state with Disc icon
